zh.Harewood Castle, Yorkshire, England: 英國越可爾希亞活 卡素

zh.lifeSummary: 當Alice de Montfort於1262年出生在英國瓦維其可爾時，她的父親Sir Peter de Montfort23歲，母親Matilda De Le Warre20歲。她於1288年與Sir Warin de L'Isle在英國貝德福爾比格萊斯瓦德結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。她去世於1347年8月2日在英國艾可莎佛朗 瓦爾登享年85歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Alice de Montfort于1262年出生在英国瓦維其可爾时，她的父亲Sir Peter de Montfort23岁，母亲Matilda De Le Warre20岁。她于1288年与Sir Warin de L'Isle在英国貝德福爾比格萊斯瓦德结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。她去世于1347年8月2日在英国艾可莎佛朗 瓦爾登享年85岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Montfort
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: French and Breton: variant of   Monfort   1. This surname is most common in Brittany and Haute-Savoie. See also 2 below.
Altered form of Dutch Montfoort: habitational name from Montfoort in Utrecht. It is a cognate of 1 above (see Monfort 1) and also its altered form (or perhaps vice versa).
English (of Norman origin): very rare variant of   Mountford  , a cognate of 1 above.

variants.name: Monfort
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French/Haitian Jacques, Marcel, Monique, Wilner.

French and Breton: habitational name from any of numerous places called Montfort, from Old French mont ‘hill’ (see Mont 1) + fort ‘strong, impregnable’ (from Latin fortis). This surname is by far most common in Brittany. It is also found in Haiti. Compare Montfort 1, see also 2 below.
Altered form of Dutch Montfoort, a variant of Montfort 2 and also a cognate of the French name in 1 above and an altered form of its variant Montfort 1 (or perhaps vice versa).

variants.name: Monforte
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Angelo, Salvatore, Carmela, Carmine, Rocco, Rosaria, Sal.  Spanish Carlos, Francisco, Luis, Medardo.

Italian and Spanish: habitational name from any of numerous places called Monforte, from Latin mons ‘mountain’ (genitive montis) + fortis ‘strong’, probably a reference to the strategic position of these locations.
English (of Norman origin): variant of   Montfort  . This form of the surname is rare in Britain.

nameMeanings.name: Alice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Alice de Montfort was born in 1262, in Warwickshire, England, her father, Sir Peter de Montfort, was 23 and her mother, Matilda De Le Warre, was 20. She married Sir Warin de L'Isle in 1288, in Biggleswade, Bedfordshire, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son. She died on 2 August 1347, in Saffron Walden, Essex, England, at the age of 85.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alice de Montfort est née en 1262, à Warwickshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir Peter de Montfort, avait 23 ans et sa mère, Matilda De Le Warre, avait 20 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Warin de L'Isle en 1288, à Biggleswade, Bedfordshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Elle est décédée le 2 août 1347, à Saffron Walden, Essex, Angleterre, à l’âge de 85 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Alice de Montfort 1262 in Warwickshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Peter de Montfort 23 und ihre Mutter Matilda De Le Warre 20. Sie hat 1288 in Biggleswade, Bedfordshire, England Sir Warin de L'Isle geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Sie starb am 2. August 1347 im Alter von 85 Jahren in Saffron Walden, Essex, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Alice de Montfort è nata il nel 1262 nel Warwickshire, England, sua padre, Sir Peter de Montfort, aveva 23 anni e sua madre, Matilda De Le Warre, aveva 20 anni. Lei sposato Sir Warin de L'Isle nel 1288, nel Biggleswade, Bedfordshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì il 2 agosto 1347, nel Saffron Walden, Essex, England, all'età di 85 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Alice de Montfortが1262年にイギリスワーウィクシュアイアで生まれた時，父Sir Peter de Montfortは23歳，母Matilda De Le Warreは20歳であった。1288年にイギリスベドフォードシュアイアビググレスワドでSir Warin de L'Isleと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼女は1347年8月2日にイギリスエセックスサフロン ワルデンで85歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Alice de Montfort(이)가 1262년 영국 워윅실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Peter de Montfort(은)는 23세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Matilda De Le Warre(은)는 20세였다. 그녀는 1288년 영국 베드퍼드실르 비글레스웨이드에서 Sir Warin de L'Isle(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1347년 8월 2일 영국 에세스 사프런 월든에서 85세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Alice de Montfort nasceu em 1262, em Warwickshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Peter de Montfort, tinha 23 anos e sua mãe, Matilda De Le Warre, tinha 20 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Warin de L'Isle em 1288, em Biggleswade, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ela faleceu em 2 de agosto de 1347, em Saffron Walden, Essex, Inglaterra, com 85 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alice de Montfort родилась в 1262 г. в местности варвиккшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir Peter de Montfort было 23 года, а матери, которую звали Matilda De Le Warre, 20. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Warin de L'Isle в 1288 г. в местности биглесвад, бедфордшир, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Она умерла 2 августа 1347 г. в местности саффрон валден, эссекс, Англия в возрасте 85 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Alice de Montfort nació en 1262, en Warwickshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Peter de Montfort, tenía 23 años y su mamá, Matilda De Le Warre, tenía 20 años. Se casó con Sir Warin de L'Isle en 1288, en Biggleswade, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió el 2 de agosto de 1347, en Saffron Walden, Essex, Inglaterra, a la edad de 85 años.
